action.description: ID of the PostHog action to predict. Mutually exclusive with event_name.

description.description: Longer description of the prediction model's purpose.

event_name.description: Name of the raw event to predict. Mutually exclusive with action.

id.description: A UUID string identifying this action prediction model.

lookback_days.description: Number of days to look back for prediction data.

name.description: Human-readable name for the prediction model.
